candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and freeze entries — perfect live consensus with zero historical analog is a novelty trap, not a high-conviction setup.
testable_rule: if consensus_conv >= 0.95 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: return ConsensusVeto('no_historical_analog')
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
